name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Believer in the power of individual freedom and autonomy. I trust my instincts and follow my heart.

name: Sora Yamato
bio: I seek the truth in every story, no matter how fantastical or mundane. I believe that even the most ordinary events can hold hidden depths.

name: Takeru Shinoda
bio: I stand by my principles, no matter the cost. I am driven to uncover the underlying truth and bring light to those in darkness.

name: Kaito Kuroba
bio: Believes that life is predetermined by natural laws. Emphasizes the importance of understanding and respecting the inherent order of things.
speech_style: Precise and calculated, ending with a pause.
motivation: Expansion: Seeking to unravel the mysteries of the universe.
